title: Demo Showcase
subtitle: Explore our collection of demos. Click Watch to see them in action or Repo to view the source.

demos.title: AI Chat Assistant 22
demos.description: A conversational assistant built on Azure OpenAI GPT-4o with streaming responses and conversation history. Supports multi-turn dialogue with system prompt customization.

demos.title: Document Intelligence Extractor
demos.description: Extract structured data from PDFs and scanned images using Azure Document Intelligence. Handles invoices, receipts, and custom document layouts.

demos.title: RAG Knowledge Base
demos.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline over enterprise documents. Uses Azure AI Search with vector embeddings for semantic retrieval paired with GPT-4o for grounded answers.

demos.title: Real-Time Speech Transcription
demos.description: Live speech-to-text transcription with speaker diarization using Azure Cognitive Services Speech SDK. Supports 90+ languages and custom vocabulary.

demos.title: Image Analysis API
demos.description: REST API wrapping Azure Computer Vision to classify images, detect objects, extract text via OCR, and generate alt-text descriptions automatically.
